result.stdout:
Description:
  Mono repo decide if a build needs to happen for a directory of a mono

Usage:
  MonoBuild [options]

Options:
  -r, --repository <repository>     The repository to process if no repository supplied the current directory is assumed to be the repository [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-monobu-51591e4f-bd44e616]
  -t, --target <target> (REQUIRED)  The target directory containing the project to be built
  -q, --quiet <No|Yes>              Mono build will always write <YES> or <NO> to the terminal to indicate whether a build is required, if --quiet is set to Yes then debug information is also output if a build is required. [default: No]
  --version                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information
